title: Pest Control Excellence earns Best of George nomination – A testament to trust, quality, and community
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Since 2006, Pest Control Excellence has been the silent shield behind thousands of homes and businesses across the Garden Route — protecting families, properties, and reputations with expert care.


> Now, nearly two decades later, this dedicated local business is proud and humbled to be nominated for the Best of George 2025.


More than just a recognition, this nomination is a reflection of the company’s unwavering commitment to integrity, professionalism, and personalised service. “Being nominated for Best of George is not just about a title,” says the team. “It validates years of hard work and pushes us to continue setting the benchmark in pest control.”

What sets Pest Control Excellence apart in a highly competitive industry? Their approach is simple yet powerful: local knowledge, expert training, eco-conscious solutions, and real care. As certified professionals registered with the Department of Fishery and Forestry, the team brings both qualifications and a passion for safety and sustainability to every job.

With an emphasis on transparent communication, safe treatments for families and pets, and no hidden costs, Pest Control Excellence makes it clear: “We don’t just eliminate pests — we protect what matters most.”

In an era of rushed appointments and impersonal service, this team stands out by giving each client dedicated time, thoughtful inspections, and detailed explanations. “We’re not a franchise. We’re your neighbours. We understand the unique pest challenges of the Garden Route because we live here too.”

For Pest Control Excellence, winning Best of George would be more than a feather in their cap — it would be a heartfelt reward for years of consistently going the extra mile for their community.


> Vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


“We’ve earned the trust of our clients, not through flashy ads, but through reliable results and genuine relationships. This nomination is thanks to them — and we couldn’t be more grateful.”

The team extends a sincere thank you to all who’ve supported and nominated them. “With your vote, we’ll continue to protect George with the excellence you deserve.”

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
